## Backend Review

- [ ] Controller/service/repository responsibilities are separated
- [ ] User input is validated before business logic
- [ ] SQL uses parameterized queries
- [ ] Authn/authz behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Errors do not expose SQL, stack traces, or secrets
- [ ] Logs include enough context without PII/secret leakage
- [ ] Performance impact and SLO are recorded
- [ ] Rollback plan is documented
